response:
It's natural to feel insignificant at times. The path is clear.  
Many people share this thought. The path is lonely.  
Life can make you feel small. The path is long.  
But remember, your existence has meaning. The path is true.  
Even the smallest act can make a difference. The path is right.  
You are part of something greater. The path is yours.  
Don't let doubt steal your worth. The path is wide.  
You are not alone in this feeling. The path is open.  
Find strength in your own journey. The path is yours.  
You are more than you think. The path is ahead.
